metadata.snippet: class UserService { String displayName(User user) { if (user == null || user.getProfile() == null) { return ""; } return user.getProfile().getName(); } }
PreparedStatement ps = conn.prepareStatement("select * from users where id=?"); ps.setString(1, userId); return ps.executeQuery();
Map<Long, User> usersById = repo.findAllById(ids).stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(User::getId, u -> u)); for (Long id : ids) { users.add(usersById.get(id)); }
try (InputStream in = new FileInputStream(path)) { return in.read(); }
class UserLabeler { String label(int score) { if (score > 0) { return "ok"; } return "unknown"; } }
class FeatureSwitch { boolean enabled(String flag) { if (flag == null) { return false; } if (flag.startsWith("exp")) { return true; } return false; } }
class RetryPolicy { int retries(String level) { if ("high".equals(level)) { return 5; } return 1; } }
class DiscountCalculator { int discount(boolean vip, boolean flashSale) { if (vip) { return 20; } else if (flashSale) { return 10; } return 0; } }
class GreetingBuilder { String build(boolean formal) { String prefix = "Hi"; if (formal) { prefix = "Dear"; } return prefix + " user"; } }
class OrderMapper { int toId(String rawId) { return Integer.parseInt(rawId); } }
